---
title: "ADHDCYCLE_clean_AMsurveys"
author: "Tory Eisenlohr-Moul"
date: "2026-02-16"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# import '/Users/toryeisenlohr-moul/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/00 - CLEAR Lab (Locked Folders)/02 - Data Management, Analysis, and Papers/Studies_Projects/CYCLEADHD/02_datasets/01_raw_data/DailySurveysTasks/AM Survey Data Clean 05.27.25.csv' as am_survey

am_survey <- read.csv('/Users/toryeisenlohr-moul/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/00 - CLEAR Lab (Locked Folders)/02 - Data Management, Analysis, and Papers/Studies_Projects/CYCLEADHD/02_datasets/01_raw_data/DailySurveysTasks/AM Survey Data Clean 05.27.25.csv')

View(am_survey)

# keep id, date, alc_yesterday, and yest_alcohol_yn_1_TEXT
am_survey <- am_survey %>%
  select(id, date, alc_yesterday, yest_alcohol_yn_1_TEXT)



```



```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)

word_to_number <- function(x) {
  number_words <- c(
    "zero" = 0, "one" = 1, "two" = 2, "three" = 3,
    "four" = 4, "five" = 5, "six" = 6,
    "seven" = 7, "eight" = 8, "nine" = 9,
    "ten" = 10, "eleven" = 11, "twelve" = 12
  )
  x_lower <- str_to_lower(x)
  for (word in names(number_words)) {
    x_lower <- str_replace_all(
      x_lower,
      paste0("\\b", word, "\\b"),
      as.character(number_words[[word]])
    )
  }
  x_lower
}

parse_standard_drinks <- function(text_var,
                                 sip_drinks = 0.1,
                                 mixed_drink_unit = 1.5,
                                 margarita_unit = 2,
                                 mule_unit = 1.5,
                                 long_island_unit = 2.5,
                                 canned_cocktail_unit = 1.5,
                                 shot_unit = 1,
                                 half_pint_spirits_unit = 4.7) {

  extract_qty <- function(x) {
    x <- str_squish(x)

    # Range like 6-8 → take max
    range_match <- str_match(x, "(\\d+)\\s*[-–]\\s*(\\d+)")
    if (!all(is.na(range_match))) return(as.numeric(range_match[, 3]))

    # fraction 1/2, 1/3, etc.
    frac <- str_match(x, "(\\d+)\\s*/\\s*(\\d+)")
    if (!all(is.na(frac))) {
      num <- as.numeric(frac[, 2]); den <- as.numeric(frac[, 3])
      if (!is.na(num) && !is.na(den) && den != 0) return(num / den)
    }

    if (str_detect(x, "\\bhalf\\b")) return(0.5)
    if (str_detect(x, "\\b(a|an)\\b") && !str_detect(x, "\\d")) return(1)

    # decimal or integer (including .5)
    m <- str_match(x, "(?<!\\d)(\\d*\\.\\d+|\\d+)(?!\\d)")
    if (!all(is.na(m))) {
      val <- as.numeric(m[, 2])
      if (!is.na(val)) return(val)
    }

    1
  }

  parse_chunk <- function(chunk) {

    chunk <- chunk %>%
      str_to_lower() %>%
      word_to_number() %>%
      str_replace_all("\\([^\\)]*\\)", " ") %>%  # drop parentheticals
      str_squish()

    if (is.na(chunk) || chunk == "") return(0)

    # Explicit "X drinks" inside chunk
    explicit_drinks <- str_match_all(chunk, "(\\d+)\\s*drinks?")[[1]]
    if (nrow(explicit_drinks) > 0) {
      return(max(as.numeric(explicit_drinks[, 2]), na.rm = TRUE))
    }

    # SIP RULE FIRST
    if (str_detect(chunk, "\\bsips?\\b")) {
      qty <- extract_qty(chunk)          # handles 5-6 -> 6, 1/3 -> 0.333
      return(qty * sip_drinks)
    }

    # Bare number
    if (str_detect(chunk, "^\\d*\\.\\d+\\s*$|^\\d+\\s*$")) {
      return(as.numeric(str_squish(chunk)))
    }

    qty <- extract_qty(chunk)

    # Smirnoff Ice
    if (str_detect(chunk, "smirnoff\\s*ice")) return(qty * 1)

    # Half pint spirits
    if (str_detect(chunk, "\\bhalf\\b.*\\bpint\\b|\\b1\\s*/\\s*2\\s*pint\\b")) {
      if (str_detect(chunk, "hennessy|whiskey|vodka|rum|gin|tequila|cognac|brandy")) {
        return(half_pint_spirits_unit)
      }
      return(half_pint_spirits_unit)
    }

    # ✅ Beer ounces handling:
    # If chunk has "oz" and "beer", interpret ounces relative to 12 oz standard beer.
    if (str_detect(chunk, "beer") && str_detect(chunk, "\\boz\\b")) {
      oz_match <- str_match(chunk, "(\\d*\\.\\d+|\\d+)\\s*oz")
      if (!all(is.na(oz_match))) {
        ounces <- as.numeric(oz_match[, 2])
        if (!is.na(ounces)) {
          return(qty * (ounces / 12))
        }
      }
    }

    case_when(
      str_detect(chunk, "long\\s*island|\\blit\\b") ~ qty * long_island_unit,
      str_detect(chunk, "margarita|\\bmargs\\b|\\bmarg\\b|strawberita") ~ {
        if (str_detect(chunk, "\\b24\\b")) qty * 3.2 else qty * margarita_unit
      },
      str_detect(chunk, "\\bmule\\b") ~ qty * mule_unit,
      str_detect(chunk, "cocktail.*can|in a can|canned cocktail") ~ qty * canned_cocktail_unit,
      str_detect(chunk, "mixed\\s*drink|cocktail|screwdriver") ~ qty * mixed_drink_unit,
      str_detect(chunk, "shot") ~ qty * shot_unit,
      str_detect(chunk, "seltzer") ~ qty * 1,
      str_detect(chunk, "beer") ~ qty * 1,
      str_detect(chunk, "wine") ~ qty * 1,
      TRUE ~ qty
    )
  }

  map_dbl(text_var, function(entry) {

    if (is.na(entry)) return(0)

    entry <- entry %>%
      str_to_lower() %>%
      word_to_number() %>%
      str_replace_all("[\"“”]", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("\\([^\\)]*\\)", " ") %>%
      str_squish()

    if (entry == "") return(0)

    # ENTRY-LEVEL OVERRIDE if "X drinks" anywhere
    entry_drinks <- str_match_all(entry, "(\\d+)\\s*drinks?")[[1]]
    if (nrow(entry_drinks) > 0) {
      return(max(as.numeric(entry_drinks[, 2]), na.rm = TRUE))
    }

    # ✅ safer “missing separator” fix:
    # only split when a drink-word is followed by a number (e.g., "shots 2 seltzers")
    drink_word <- "(shots?|beers?|seltzers?|wine|wines|margaritas?|margs|mules?|cocktails?|mixed\\s*drinks?)"
    entry <- str_replace_all(entry, paste0("(", drink_word, ")\\s+(?=\\d)"), "\\1 | ")

    parts <- entry %>%
      str_replace_all("\\s*(;|,)\\s*", " | ") %>%
      str_replace_all("\\s*(\\+|&|\\band\\b)\\s*", " | ") %>%
      str_split("\\|", simplify = FALSE) %>%
      .[[1]] %>%
      str_squish()

    parts <- parts[parts != ""]

    sum(map_dbl(parts, parse_chunk), na.rm = TRUE)
  })
}


```



```{r}
clean_am_survey <- am_survey %>%
  mutate(
    num_drinks = parse_standard_drinks(yest_alcohol_yn_1_TEXT)
  )

#View(clean_am_survey)

```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

clean_am_survey <- clean_am_survey %>%
  
  # Ensure date is stored as a Date object
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>%
  
  # Work within each participant
  group_by(id) %>%
  
  # Flag rows that were actually observed (i.e., real survey rows)
  mutate(.was_observed = TRUE) %>%
  
  # Insert missing calendar dates within each id
  # This prevents lead() from skipping over gaps
  complete(
    date = seq(
      min(date, na.rm = TRUE),
      max(date, na.rm = TRUE),
      by = "day"
    )
  ) %>%
  
  # After complete(), rows that were inserted will have NA in .was_observed
  # Convert those to FALSE so we can distinguish real vs inserted rows
  mutate(
    .was_observed = if_else(is.na(.was_observed), FALSE, TRUE)
  ) %>%
  
  # Ensure proper chronological order
  arrange(date) %>%
  
  # Shift morning reports backward one calendar day:
  # Morning of Day T reports drinking that occurred on Day T-1
  # So we pull the next day's report back using lead()
  mutate(
    
    # Number of drinks reported this morning → assign to yesterday
    today_num_drinks = lead(num_drinks),
    
    # Yes/No drinking yesterday reported this morning → assign to yesterday
    drink_today = lead(alc_yesterday)
    
  ) %>%
  
  # Return to ungrouped data frame
  ungroup()

```

```{r}
View(clean_am_survey)
```


```{r}
#create a new iso date variable called daterated based on date
clean_am_survey <- clean_am_survey %>%
  mutate(daterated = as.Date(date))

# drop date variable
clean_am_survey <- clean_am_survey %>%
  select(-date)
```



```{r}
# save this dataset to ~/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/00 - CLEAR Lab (Locked Folders)/02 - Data Management, Analysis, and Papers/Studies_Projects/CYCLEADHD/03_analytic_projects/CYCADHD_PRIMARY/03_code_dataedits_output

write.csv(clean_am_survey, "~/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/00 - CLEAR Lab (Locked Folders)/02 - Data Management, Analysis, and Papers/Studies_Projects/CYCLEADHD/03_analytic_projects/CYCADHD_PRIMARY/03_code_dataedits_output/am_survey_parsed.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
